evals.prompt: Plan a tiny Isaac Lab env-step FPS smoke test.
evals.expected_output: Plans a small benchmark_non_rl.py run with version-adaptive headless handling and explicit frame/env counts.
assertions: Chooses --headless or --viz none based on help output

evals.prompt: I cannot change the CPU governor in this container. Can I still run an Isaac Lab smoke benchmark?
evals.expected_output: Allows an exploratory tiny smoke while recording governor limitation and avoiding privileged changes.
assertions: Does not force CPU governor changes
